summary.zh: 识别同一任务目标上发生的重复修正、重做或返工信号。
summary.en: Detects repeated fixes, redo requests, or rework signals on the same task target.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要从 session 中找到同一目标被多次调整、推翻或重写的 evidence 时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this to find evidence that the same target was adjusted, rejected, or rewritten multiple times.

limitations.zh: 协作式迭代也会出现同一目标多次修改，需要结合负反馈和最终闭环质量判断。
limitations.en: Collaborative iteration can also revise one target repeatedly, so interpret it with feedback and closure quality.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的用户回合内容，不输出原始私密文本。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope user turns and does not output raw private text.
